hook: A lot of dating mistakes happen after the nervous system has already started outrunning reality.
body: When your body moves into urgency, your mind gets worse at reading signals, pacing effort, and protecting self-respect.

hook: Men often try to solve emotional activation with more action instead of with more regulation.
body: Calm first, then decide. Good judgment usually returns when your body stops arguing with uncertainty.
